name: Windswept Mountain Pass
description: The trail narrows into a high pass hemmed by walls of blue-white ice. Wind funnels between the cliffs with a ceaseless, mournful howl, driving needles of snow before it. Drifts pile waist-deep against the rock, and the way north climbs steeply toward a glacier.
ambient_messages: A blizzard howls down the pass, and for a moment the world is nothing but white.
The wind shrieks through the cliffs like a chorus of frozen voices.
Ice groans somewhere in the rock walls, deep and slow, as the cold works at the stone.
